nasb.text: Now there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the Lord, and Satan also came among them.

esv.text: Now there was a day when the sons of God came to present themselves before the Lord, and Satan also came among them.

cnv.text: 有一天，　神的眾子都來侍立在耶和華面前，撒但也來到他們中間。

ccb.text: 有一天，众天使来朝见耶和华，撒旦也在他们当中。
